---
title: "Advanced Workflows"
subtitle: "Combining dynamic reporting with version control, automation, and containerization"
author:
  - name: "Gorka Fraga González"
    orcid: 0000-0002-1857-8607

  - name: "Fabio Molo"
    orcid: 0000-0001-9320-5854

  - name: "Peter Degen"
    orcid: 0009-0004-0706-9200
    
  - name: "Samuel Pawel"
    orcid: 0000-0003-2779-320X
preview-links: true
listing: 
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle]
  type: table
  contents: 'slides'
  id: 'slides'
---

<iframe allowfullscreen class="pdf" src="Advanced_workflows.pdf" width="100%" height="700px" style="border: 2px solid black;">

</iframe>

#### Go to online slides in full screen
